items.summary: Fix the backend order cancellation logic so that when the bot refreshes or stops, all previously placed grid orders are correctly identified and cancelled on ICDex before new orders are placed or the bot halts.

Fix the backend order repositioning logic so that after cancellation, the bot correctly recalculates grid price levels and places new buy/sell orders at the updated positions based on the current market price and configured spread/grid parameters.

Update the OpenOrdersPanel and the cancel-all mutation in useQueries.ts so that after a cancel-all action completes, the open orders list is immediately refreshed and the UI reflects the updated (empty or repositioned) order state.
